testcase.name: test_clock_in
testcase.failure: tests/test_team_management.py:311: in test_clock_in assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to clock in: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to clock in: {"detail":"Membre non trouvé"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_clock_out
testcase.failure: tests/test_team_management.py:336: in test_clock_out assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to clock out: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to clock out: {"detail":"Membre non trouvé"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_present_at_post
testcase.failure: tests/test_team_management.py:357: in test_present_at_post assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to mark present at post: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to mark present at post: {"detail":"Membre non trouvé"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_manual_time_entry
testcase.failure: tests/test_team_management.py:389: in test_manual_time_entry assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed manual entry: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed manual entry: {"detail":"Membre non trouvé"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_today_entry
testcase.failure: tests/test_team_management.py:410: in test_get_today_entry assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to get today entry: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to get today entry: {"detail":"Membre non trouvé"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_absence_types

failure.message: AssertionError: Missing expected absence type: TELETRAVAIL assert 'TELETRAVAIL' in ['CP', 'RTT', 'MALADIE', 'FORMATION', 'RQP', 'TT']

testcase.failure: tests/test_team_management.py:478: in test_get_absence_types assert code in type_codes, f"Missing expected absence type: {code}" E AssertionError: Missing expected absence type: TELETRAVAIL E assert 'TELETRAVAIL' in ['CP', 'RTT', 'MALADIE', 'FORMATION', 'RQP', 'TT']

testcase.name: test_get_absences
testcase.failure: tests/test_team_management.py:522: in test_get_absences assert "absences" in data E AssertionError: assert 'absences' in [{'absence_type': 'CP', 'created_at': '2026-02-01T10:02:37.731468+00:00', 'created_by': '693c2cae8a00f0294da87131', 'days_count': 4, ...}, {'absence_type': 'RTT', 'created_at': '2026-02-01T09:47:58.032917+00:00', 'created_by': '693c2cae8a00f0294da87131', 'days_count': 1, ...}]
